'''Secles Usopos''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sluissi]] councilor to the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Abdi-Badawzi]] on [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]].

He travelled to the [[Black Dust Tavern]] with two [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] to invite [[Drake Paulsen]] and his father [[Kaine Paulsen]] to a meeting with Abdi-Badawzi. Drake refused, but was stunned and kidnapped by Abdi-Badawzi as the smuggler left the tavern. He took him to the crime lord's base. At Abdi-Badawzi's inner chamber, Uslopos directed the gathered crowd to be silent so the [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] could address Drake and force him into making a smuggling run.<ref name="OOTC" />
